M32.e2eGreenCountNote: E2E green count reported by Playwright is 9 (one spec has 2 test cases); spec-file count is 8.

notes: M33 (Copilot Service) T9 SHIPPED (2026-04-17T00:52Z, commit 43f5cf7). +1 E2E spec file (8 → 9) / +1 case (green count 9 → 10) in 1.7s. Zero unit-test delta (1099/1099 steady). 2 files (+458/-6): NEW apps/desktop/e2e/copilot-service.spec.ts (422 LOC, single case titled 'configure tick → insight surfaces → dismiss → ask routes through system-copilot') + M apps/desktop/src/main/services/test-copilot-provider.ts (+36/-6 — replaced the T8-baked Object.freeze({}) with a single {'strategia-x': <InsightDraft JSON>} entry in CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE). NO production code touched; test-copilot-provider.ts is loaded only when isTestMode() is true at composition root. Fixture-registration path chosen: Path A (source-baked CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE) — ruled out Path B (app.evaluate to main process) because electron-vite's inlineDynamicImports collapses main into a single file so module-path imports can't resolve, and Path C (test-only IPC) unnecessary. T8 did NOT bake system-copilot-actor CANNED_TABLE entries into test-agentic-provider.ts (3 existing entries stayed M31/M32 only); spec uses the __ECHO_AGENT__: sentinel path instead to script plan → tool_call(query_copilot_insights) → final_answer. Flow: boot Electron NODE_ENV=test → companies.list → tickets.create + close → copilot.configure({companyId}) as T5 manual-tick → copilot.insights ≥ 1 → copilot.dismiss → events.list contains copilot.dismissed (invariant #11) → copilot.ask with __ECHO_AGENT__ sentinel → poll command.getRunSnapshot until terminal answer + assert tool_call(query_copilot_insights) step → chat.list(threadId) ≥ 2 messages → chat.listThreads asserts isSystemAgent=true on copilot thread → regression guards: 'Confirm destructive action' + 'Confirm write-side agentic run' both ABSENT. Spec-level biome-ignore + `(window as any).teamx` casts for IPC evaluate (same pattern as rag-flow.spec.ts + vault-backup.spec.ts where E2E tsconfig doesn't see renderer's window.d.ts augmentation). Full verification gate before commit: typecheck clean across 6 packages, lint 1 pre-existing error (entity-resolver.ts:352 from M30 T2) + 24 warnings (0 new), vitest 1099/1099 in 20.2s, E2E 10/10 in 27.4s across 9 spec files.

M33 T9 DESIGN CALLS + GOTCHAS: (a) AgentStepPayload field is `.data` at runtime (not `.payload` as the JSDoc suggests) — cost one E2E run to catch; documented inline in spec. (b) Zod `z.string().optional()` rejects JSON `null` (null is not a string) — first fixture had actionIntent:null which silently failed parseDrafts and proposedCount=0 tripped the ≥1 assertion. Fix: omit the field entirely so zod treats it as undefined. Documented inline on the fixture. (c) Substring key `'strategia-x'` stable hit because analyzer's buildAnalysisPrompt renders `Company: Strategia-X` verbatim and normalizePrompt lowercases+trims+collapses to `company: strategia-x` which contains the key. (d) Coordinator hit the ABI dance on verification: `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild` compiled better-sqlite3 for Electron ABI 125 (vitest needs system Node 137). `pnpm rebuild better-sqlite3` no-op'd silently due to pnpm content-addressed cache. Fix: `cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npm run install` triggered a full node-gyp rebuild. To carry into T10: CLAUDE.md Troubleshooting needs a 'Unit tests fail with NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch after running electron-rebuild' entry with the node-gyp rebuild recipe.

M33 (Copilot Service) T8 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit f245821). +5 unit tests (1094 → 1099, exact T8 target). NEW apps/desktop/src/main/services/test-copilot-provider.ts (~217 LOC) — fourth member of the agentic-surface test-seam quartet (test-classifier.ts M30 + test-agentic-provider.ts M31 + test-agentic-tools.ts M32 + test-copilot-provider.ts M33). Three-tier lookup: (1) `__ECHO_COPILOT__:<json>` sentinel in the user prompt → JSON.parse + JSON.stringify round-trip + echo verbatim, (2) normalized-substring match against closure-local fixtures → runtime-mutable `runtimeFixtures` Map → frozen `CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE` (seeded empty; T9 populates), first-hit wins, (3) `FIXTURE_COPILOT_EMPTY` never-throw fallback returning `text: '[]', promptTokens: 0, completionTokens: 0, costUsd: 0, provider: 'test-mode', model: 'test-copilot'` — shape-identical to the T4 inline placeholder. Exports: TEST_COPILOT_SENTINEL + TEST_COPILOT_PROVIDER + TEST_COPILOT_MODEL + FIXTURE_COPILOT_EMPTY + CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE + TestCopilotCompleteOptions + createTestCopilotComplete + addCopilotFixture + clearCopilotFixtures. Normalization is the M30 pattern (lowercase + trim + collapse whitespace). Defensive empty-prompt Error throw mirrors production-provider behaviour so specs can assert the shape instead of silently receiving empty drafts. NEW test-copilot-provider.test.ts (+5 tests exact — sentinel echo, normalized-substring canned hit, fallback empty drafts, empty-prompt Error rejection, provider/model stamping across all three tiers). main/index.ts composition root: replaces the T4 inline `async () => ({ text: '[]', … })` placeholder in the test-mode `resolveComplete` branch with `createTestCopilotComplete()`; production branch untouched; import sorted alphabetically (test-agentic-provider → test-agentic-tools → test-classifier → test-copilot-provider). Actor routing preserved — non-copilot actors (system-agent) continue to hit M31's test-agentic-provider via the agentic-loop path; system-copilot invocations hit this new seam via CopilotAnalyzerService.resolveComplete. 3 files (+298/-12). 0 lint errors / 24 warnings steady / typecheck clean across all 6 workspace packages. Full suite 1099/1099 passing in 44.36s.

M33 T8 DESIGN CALLS: (a) `CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE` is a FROZEN empty Record — per-spec fixtures live in a module-scope `runtimeFixtures` Map written via `addCopilotFixture(key, response)`, preserving the invariant that module-load-time constants are never mutated. `clearCopilotFixtures()` is the afterEach reset. (b) Substring matching (NOT exact match) on normalized user prompts, matching M30's test-classifier pattern — T9 fixture keys can be short recognizable fragments of live prompts. (c) Sentinel JSON round-trip (JSON.parse + JSON.stringify) normalizes encoding + whitespace so callers see byte-identical output across runs even if the embedded payload had stray whitespace. (d) Empty-prompt rejection throws an Error rather than returning FIXTURE_COPILOT_EMPTY silently — mirrors production-provider behaviour where a zero-length user prompt is a pipeline bug upstream; specs can assert the error shape instead of tracking a false-negative empty-drafts return. (e) Match priority at lookup: closure-local inlineFixtures → runtimeFixtures → CANNED_COPILOT_TABLE (frozen). Inner loop iterates each source; first matching key wins. Keeps closure-over-options viable for isolated unit tests without touching module state.

M33 (Copilot Service) T7 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit 4a373bd). +7 unit tests (1087 → 1094, exact T7 target). Three clamped copilot settings keys wired end-to-end: copilot_enabled (bool default true), copilot_interval_minutes (1-60 default 5), copilot_categories (subset of COPILOT_CATEGORIES default full set). NEW packages/shared-types/src/ipc.ts exports: SettingsGetCopilotResponse / SettingsSetCopilotRequest wire types, COPILOT_SETTINGS_CLAMPS, COPILOT_ENABLED_DEFAULT, and COPILOT_CATEGORIES runtime constant (new — the type-only CopilotCategory union from events.ts grows a sibling value-level export; local copies in copilot-insights.ts / agentic-tools-copilot.ts / test-agentic-tools.ts left alone to bound T7 surface). IpcContract gains settings.getCopilot / settings.setCopilot channels; TeamXApi.settings gains getCopilot / setCopilot methods. Settings repo extended: 3 new SETTING_DEFAULTS entries + getCopilot() + setCopilot() with clamp-at-read (stale out-of-range persisted values return the clamp bound) + write-side filter (unknown categories stripped, empty categories fall back to full set — conservative default). NEW settings-copilot.test.ts (+4 tests: defaults, dual-path interval clamp, empty→full fallback, unknown-filter). handlers.ts extends IpcSettingsRepo + IpcHandlerDeps (optional copilotAnalyzerService dep), adds settingsGetCopilot + settingsSetCopilot handlers; setCopilot fires repo write then analyzer.restart(companyId) synchronously so the per-company timer picks up the new interval without an app restart. register.ts + preload/api.ts wire the 2 channels end-to-end. Composition root wires lazy copilotAnalyzerService closure (resolves the module-level handle at call time — analyzer is instantiated after createIpcHandlers) and threads settingsRepo.getCopilot() into createCopilotAnalyzerService.getSettings dep (per-tick snapshot, global-scope — companyId ignored in T7). Renderer: use-settings.ts gains useCopilotSettings + useSetCopilot React Query hooks; NEW copilot-section.tsx (Strategia-red Sparkles header, switch-style enabled toggle, number input 1-60 for interval, 5 category checkbox chips with empty→full optimistic fallback) rendered in settings-view.tsx after PlannerSection. NEW settings-copilot-handlers.test.ts (+2 tests: getCopilot round-trips via createIpcHandlers, setCopilot persists AND invokes analyzer.restart with correct companyId). copilot-analyzer-service.test.ts extended with 1 restart-picks-up-new-interval test verifying the setInterval ms delta after a simulated settings change. settings.test.ts seed-count assertions bumped 18→21 and 17→20 for the 3 new keys. 13 files (+818/-3), 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean across all 6 workspace packages. 1094/1094 unit tests passing in 23.66s.

M33 T7 DESIGN CALLS: (a) COPILOT_CATEGORIES runtime constant added to shared-types as a NEW export rather than extracting the existing literal from copilot-insights.ts — keeps the repo/service and shared-types independent and bounds T7 surface. Ripple cleanup to a single source can happen in a later milestone. (b) SettingsSetCopilotRequest.companyId is REQUIRED but semantically consumed only by the handler's analyzer.restart side effect; the repo itself ignores it (copilot settings are global scope like agentic + planner). Alternative designs (per-company scope_id; handler iterates companiesRepo.list()) were both rejected — the queue spec is explicit and the global/per-timer split matches the production reality where multi-company setups are rare today. (c) copilotAnalyzerService dep on IpcHandlerDeps is OPTIONAL + a lazy wrapper closure at the composition root — the analyzer is instantiated AFTER createIpcHandlers in main/index.ts so we either reorder init (big blast radius) or close over copilotAnalyzerServiceInstance. The closure approach preserves init order and defensively no-ops if a setCopilot fires before the analyzer is live (renderer can't reach settings until after app-ready, which is post-analyzer). (d) The settings-copilot-handlers.test.ts file is NEW rather than folded into the sparse handlers.test.ts — matches the per-subsystem test-file pattern (copilot-handlers.test.ts / rag-handlers.test.ts / backup-handlers.test.ts / updater-handlers.test.ts / vault-handlers.test.ts). (e) Analyzer restart-test harness note: setInterval MUST return a truthy handle — production stop() gates clearInterval + schedules.delete on `if (timer)`, so returning 0 from the fake setInterval would leave the schedule map stale and start() would short-circuit on schedules.has. Documented inline as a comment for future test authors.

M33 (Copilot Service) T6 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit 3c00be7). +5 unit tests (1082 → 1087, exact T6 target). Replaces the T5 copilot.ask stub with a full round-trip through AgenticLoopService.start using employeeId = system-copilot. NEW services/agentic-tools-copilot.ts — query_copilot_insights Tool factory (zod-strict schema, {rows, truncated} envelope, MAX_COPILOT_ROWS=50 cap, over-fetch-by-one truncation detection, JSON-safe CopilotInsightProjection distinct from Drizzle CopilotInsightRow, includeDismissed flag defaulting false) + buildCopilotToolRegistry(employee, deps) level-gated composer returning [query_copilot_insights] when employee.roleId === SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID, [] otherwise. NEW services/copilot-service.ts CopilotService front-door wrapping AgenticLoopService.start — resolves system-copilot via employeesRepo.findSystemByRoleId(companyId, SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID), passes id through as explicit employeeId. Return shape { runId, threadId } matches M31 IpcExecuteResult.complex_request field-for-field (M34 sidebar wire-contract stability). EDIT test-agentic-tools.ts — extends three-tier canned seam: ECHO_COPILOT_QUERY_SENTINEL='__ECHO_COPILOT_QUERY__:', CANNED_COPILOT_QUERY_TABLE (empty in T6; T9 populates), FIXTURE_COPILOT_EMPTY fallback (never-throw contract); TestEmployeeContext.roleId? added; createTestToolsForEmployee swaps write-side for copilot tool set when roleId matches. EDIT db/repos/copilot-insights.ts — ListActiveFilter.includeDismissed? optional; listActive drops isNull(dismissedAt) predicate when true (TTL filter preserved). EDIT ipc/copilot-handlers.test.ts — flipped T5 'throws when stub in effect' assertion to 'rejects empty companyId/text before dispatch' since comp root always wires agenticLoopStart now. EDIT main/index.ts — +SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID + buildCopilotToolRegistry + createCopilotService imports; buildTools callback resolves roleId via employeesRepo.getById once per run (zero cost for system-agent default) and branches to [...readSide, ...buildCopilotToolRegistry(employee, deps)] for system-copilot — system-agent path (M31 read-only + M32 write-side) unchanged; buildCopilotHandlers wires agenticLoopStart via copilot-service closure. 7 files (+982/-31), 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean across all 6 packages. 1087/1087 tests passing in 18.77s.

M33 T6 DESIGN CALLS: (a) roleId resolution happens at the composition-root buildTools callback (via employeesRepo.getById(employee.id)?.roleId) rather than by extending AgenticLoopEmployeeContext with a roleId field — preserves M31/M32 interface compat and keeps the lookup contained to the one path that needs it. (b) includeDismissed added to ListActiveFilter as an OPTIONAL boolean (defaults to T1 active-only behaviour) rather than a separate listWithDismissed repo method — single read path, minimal repo surface growth. (c) CopilotService is intentionally TINY (one method, one repo lookup, one delegation) — thread resolution stays in AgenticLoopService.start, level-gating stays in buildTools, budget/provider/pause-gate plumbing is shared by construction. (d) T5 stub branch still defended in copilot-handlers factory (throws 'not implemented' if agenticLoopStart is undefined) as defense-in-depth — the test flip removes the assertion, not the code. (e) Test seam mirrors the M32 T3 write-side mirror exactly: sentinel → canned → fallback, with the same structural shape test-agentic-tools.ts and test-agentic-provider.ts use.

M33 (Copilot Service) T5 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit a085dc7). +8 unit tests (1074 → 1082, exact T5 target — 2 tests per channel × 4 channels). NEW apps/desktop/src/main/ipc/copilot-handlers.ts — buildCopilotHandlers factory mirroring the rag-handlers.ts pattern exactly (pure, structural dep surface, zero electron imports). NEW apps/desktop/src/main/ipc/copilot-handlers.test.ts (8 tests: insights happy [newest-first + pagination + cursor + limit-clamp-to-100] + invalid-companyId; dismiss happy [bus emit + idempotent re-dismiss] + unknown-id; ask stub-happy [delegates when agenticLoopStart dep wired] + stub-throw / missing-text; configure happy [manual tick echoes counts] + production-throw [non-test-mode, analyzer untouched]). NEW packages/shared-types/src/copilot.ts — CopilotInsight wire row (JSON-safe projection distinct from CopilotInsightRow per T5 note 4), CopilotInsightListArgs/Result, CopilotDismissArgs/Result, CopilotAskArgs/Result, CopilotConfigureArgs/Result, CopilotDismissedPayload. `copilot.dismissed` appended to EventType union in shared-types/src/events.ts per invariant #11 (one new EventType literal). `copilot` namespace + 4 channels added to TeamXApi + IpcContract. Preload bridge: CHANNELS entries for copilotInsights/Dismiss/Ask/Configure + window.teamx.copilot namespace on the api surface. register.ts REQUEST_CHANNELS extended with the 4 copilot channels + command.getRunSnapshot (that one was already live on the bridge but missing from the shutdown strip list — fixed in the same commit). Composition root (main/index.ts) imports buildCopilotHandlers alongside buildRagHandlers, guards copilotAnalyzerServiceInstance non-null, instantiates with deps { copilotInsightsRepo, copilotAnalyzerService: copilotAnalyzerServiceInstance, bus, isTestMode }, registers 4 ipcMain.handle mappings right after command.getRunSnapshot. T5 leaves `agenticLoopStart` unset (undefined) so copilot.ask throws 'not implemented — T6 wires AgenticLoopService.start with system-copilot' — keeps the stub on-surface rather than a synthetic runId that would mislead the palette's step-stream hook. copilot.configure throws outside test mode with a clear message directing to settings.setCopilot (T7). 9 files changed (+939/-1). 0 lint errors / 24 warnings (baseline steady) / typecheck clean across all 6 workspace packages. Full suite 1082/1082 passing in 19.28s.

M33 (Copilot Service) T4 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit e672973). Headline task — CopilotAnalyzerService (periodic + event-triggered scheduler) + CopilotEventTrigger (30s-debounced) + migration 0012 (runs.kind column, default 'work', 'copilot' on copilot ticks, 'agentic' available for future M31 backfill) + 3 EventType additions (copilot.insight / copilot.analyzed / copilot.expired) + CopilotCategory + CopilotSeverity + CopilotAnalyzedReason unions in shared-types + listStale(now) addition to CopilotInsightsRepo (non-mutating sibling to expireStale so per-row copilot.expired can fire BEFORE physical delete) + StartRunInput gains optional `kind` defaulting to 'work' at SQL layer. Structure mirrors M31 AgenticLoopService: pause-aware providerRouter wrapper (waitUntilUnpaused poll every 250ms prod / injectable pauseGatePollMs in tests), AbortController-driven stop with canceled-status coercion, runs-table row per tick with kind='copilot', terminal copilot.analyzed discipline (exactly one per tick). Dedup via upsertWithDedup.merged flag — copilot.insight fires ONLY on insert, merges are silent. Expiry sweep at top of tick (listStale then per-row emit then expireStale). Zod InsightDraftSchema + one-shot nudge retry + malformed_output skip. System-copilot identity resolved per-tick via findSystemByRoleId. Composition root wires companiesRepo+employeesRepo+runsRepo+copilotInsightsRepo+copilotEventWindow+bus+orchestrator+resolveComplete (test-mode returns '[]'; production wraps streamAgent). stopAll() method added for clean teardown from will-quit (no per-company iteration needed — companiesRepo not in shutdown closure scope). 11 files (+2144/-1): 2 new service files, 2 new test files, 1 new migration, 1 schema update + runs.ts + copilot-insights.ts + events.ts + journal + index.ts (imports + module-state handles + instantiation + shutdown). +14 unit tests (1060 → 1074, exact match to T4 target). 12 analyzer tests cover determinism+nudge+pause+dedup+expiry+cancel. 2 trigger tests cover single-signal debounce + coalesced-reset + non-signal filter + agentic.failed payload predicate. 0 lint errors / 24 warnings / typecheck clean across all 6 workspace packages.

M33 T4 DESIGN CALLS: (a) migration 0012 ADDS `kind` column to runs rather than extending an enum — no `kind` column existed pre-M33 and no SQLite CHECK-constraint swap precedent for runs.kind in migrations 0000–0011. Default 'work' at SQL layer backfills every existing row; M31 agentic rows also default to 'work' today and are candidates for future backfill when Telemetry UI grows a per-kind filter (M34+). (b) `listStale` was added as a non-mutating sibling to `expireStale` rather than widening the latter's return shape — preserves T1's tested count-return contract. (c) CopilotEventTrigger is a SEPARATE file (not an extension of the T3 window) to keep T3 as a pure accumulator with its tests isolated. (d) ticket.closed + goal.progressChanged signals are future-ready — trigger subscribes but no upstream producer exists today; zero-cost until they land.

M33 (Copilot Service) T3 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit c6b40ae). CopilotEventWindow — in-memory per-company rolling buffer feeding T4's CopilotAnalyzerService. Bounded deque (MAX_EVENTS_PER_COMPANY=100 private const, NOT a user setting in M33), FIFO eviction on overflow, warm-start hydration from eventsRepo.listByCompany on first snapshot per company (hydrated: Set<string> flag prevents re-hydration). Subscribes to the event bus via rag-indexer pattern (start/stop + unsubscribe handle). Defensive-copy on snapshot (spread) so T4's prompt-builder iteration cannot be mutated by live push+shift. Filters token.delta at boundary (~50-500 events/turn would pin the window to streaming noise). clear(companyId) public method shipped but NOT wired to companies.archive — that IPC does not exist in the codebase today (companies repo has create/getById/getBySlug/list/setStatus only); archive-clear wiring deferred to the milestone that adds companies.archive. parseRow helper duplicated from orchestrator/event-bus.ts (module-private there); flagged for shared-module extraction if a third consumer appears. Composition root: instantiated after ragIndexer.start() with same bus+eventsRepo deps, handled in will-quit shutdown alongside rag indexer. Tests +8 (1052 → 1060, exact match to plan target): bounds (3), isolation (2), warm-start (2 including defensive-copy verification), archive-clear (1).

M33 (Copilot Service) T2 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit 4ce9d3e). system-copilot pseudo-employee — second is_system=1 row per company alongside M31's system-agent. NEW role card role-packs/strategia-official/roles/system/system-copilot.md (117 lines, level: system, tools_allowed: M31 read-only set + query_copilot_insights, tools_denied locks out decompose_project / delegate_subtask / review_deliverable / shell / filesystem / network / send_message_to_colleague). NEW packages/shared-types/src/roles.ts exports SYSTEM_AGENT_ROLE_ID, SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID, SYSTEM_ROLE_IDS tuple, isSystemRoleId() predicate — future-proofing for point-check call sites. system-agent-bootstrap.ts extended with ensureSystemCopilot + shared ensureSystemEmployee internal; legacy EnsureSystemAgent{Args,Result} kept as type aliases for M31 callers. seed.ts seeds system-copilot inline after system-agent; SeedResult gains systemCopilotId. Filter sweep verified as auto-covered — role-loader.listRoles filters level !== 'system' (line 267), listVisibleByCompany filters is_system = false, agentic-tools-write filters !e.isSystem at line 761 + returns 0 in computeRoleFit/scoreEmployee for isSystem candidates. Tests +4 (1048 → 1052): ensureSystemCopilot fresh-create + idempotent re-run + both-system-roles-coexist + listVisibleByCompany-hides-both + makePairLookup() fixture. seed.test.ts assertions updated 3 rows → 4 rows post-seed.

Dedup contract: category-scoped + numeric-drift guard + Jaccard bigram > 0.8 — locked order, cheap rejections first. M33 T0 SHIPPED (2026-04-16T08:15Z, commit c5cdeee). Plan doc at docs/plans/2026-04-16-team-x-phase-5-m33-copilot-service.md — 292 lines, 11 tasks (T0–T10), mirrors M32 structural template.

M33 task breakdown: T1 migration 0011 + CopilotInsightsRepo ✅, T2 system-copilot role card + ensureSystemCopilot ✅, T3 rolling event window + bus subscription ✅, T4 CopilotAnalyzerService (periodic scheduler + LLM + dedup + expiry) ✅, T5 copilot.* IPC surface ✅, T6 copilot.ask via agentic harness + query_copilot_insights tool ✅, T7 copilot settings + UI ✅, T8 test-copilot-provider canned seam ✅, T9 copilot-service.spec.ts E2E ✅, T10 docs + verification + milestone marker (pending). M32 (Task Planner — write-side) COMPLETE (2026-04-16T07:20Z). All 11 tasks shipped. 1033/1033 unit tests, 9/9 Playwright cases across 8 spec files green, 0 lint errors / 24 warnings, typecheck clean across all 6 packages.

M32 ABI rebuild dance is now documented as verified T10 procedure: Node ABI via `cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npx node-gyp rebuild --release` + same for keytar (pnpm rebuild is a no-op because pnpm's content-addressed store already has the hashed artifact). Electron ABI via `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar`. Pattern: Node rebuild → vitest → Electron rebuild → Playwright. M33 T1 re-verified this dance — bindings were stale from prior E2E (ABI 125), node-gyp rebuild → vitest green at 1048/1048. T9 re-verified the dance a second time — new convenience recipe `cd .../better-sqlite3 && npm run install` is an alias for node-gyp rebuild via the package's prebuild-install fallback.

Patterns proven across M30/M31/M32 and active for M33: three-tier canned test seam (classifier + provider + tools), {rows, truncated} envelope for agentic tools, data-step-kind as stable E2E selector, pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper, AbortController-driven stop with canceled-status coercion, per-task atomic commits + Loki ledger commits (chore(loki): M<N> T<N> — commit ledger (<sha>)), ABI rebuild dance on verification gate, is_system column + filter-sweep pattern (extended in M33 T2 with isSystemRoleId predicate).
